summary: P0 Bug Fixes Testing Complete - All 12 backend tests passed. Both P0 issues are FIXED: 1) Riders can now see Admin-created manual visits (MongoDB query fix from $in:[None] to simple equality), 2) Riders can accept manual visits without KeyError (customer_id/user_id compatibility added). Payment to booking flow and customer wallet working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: P0 Fix 1: Changed MongoDB query in get_available_visits from complex $and/$or with $in:[None] to simple flat $or structure with rider_id: None equality check. MongoDB $in operator with [None] returns 0 results but simple equality works correctly.
P0 Fix 2: Added support for both customer_id and user_id fields in accept_visit endpoint. Manual visits use user_id while standard bookings use customer_id.
Manual visit creation now sets all required fields: rider_id: None, property_ids, scheduled_date/time, otp, current_step, customer_id AND user_id for compatibility
seed_data_creation: Created multiple TEST_ prefixed manual visits for testing P0 bug fixes
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 bugs are fixed. Manual visits created by admin are now visible to riders in /api/visits/available endpoint. Riders can accept these visits without errors. The key fix was changing MongoDB query behavior - $in operator with [None] doesn't match null values but simple equality (rider_id: None) does.

P0_Issue1_Rider_Sees_Manual_Visits.details: Riders can see pending manual visits with rider_id=None. MongoDB query changed from $in:[None] to simple equality.

P0_Issue1_Accept_Manual_Visit.details: Riders can accept manual visits. accept_visit now handles both customer_id and user_id fields.

P0_Issue2_Payment_To_Booking.details: book_visit endpoint correctly uses visit credits from packages. Credits are deducted after booking.

P0_Issue2_Customer_Wallet.details: /api/wallet returns visits_available count and active_packages list correctly.

Visit_Schema_Consistency.details: Manual visits have all required fields: id, status, property_ids, scheduled_date/time, otp, current_step, rider_id, customer_id/user_id

frontend_verification.login_page: WORKING - Clean login form with phone/password
frontend_verification.rider_dashboard: WORKING - Shows online status, active visits, navigation tabs
frontend_verification.admin_dashboard: WORKING - Shows stats, quick actions, manual visit creation

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are real MongoDB operations

P0_Issue1.root_cause: MongoDB $in operator with [None] does not match documents where the field is null. This is a known MongoDB quirk.
P0_Issue1.fix_applied: Changed query from {rider_id: {$in: [None]}} to simple equality {rider_id: None} which MongoDB handles correctly for null matching.
P0_Issue1.verification: Created manual visits and verified they appear in /api/visits/available for online riders.

P0_Issue2.root_cause: accept_visit endpoint was accessing visit['customer_id'] directly, but manual visits created by admin use 'user_id' field instead.
P0_Issue2.fix_applied: Added fallback: customer_id = visit.get('customer_id') or visit.get('user_id') to handle both field names.
P0_Issue2.verification: Riders can now accept manual visits without KeyError.
